description: Ensures all tool calls in a conversation have corresponding tool responses. Inserts synthetic responses for any unanswered tool calls before user messages or at the end of the conversation.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: Array of message objects to clean up

outputs.name: messages
outputs.description: Array of messages with synthetic tool responses inserted for any unanswered tool calls

outputs.name: inserted_count
outputs.description: Number of synthetic tool responses that were inserted
